title: ScimListResponse
description: A SCIM 2.0 ListResponse container for multi-resource responses.

schemas.description: SCIM schema URNs identifying this as a ListResponse.

totalResults.description: Total number of resources matching the query.

startIndex.description: 1-based index of the first result in this page.

itemsPerPage.description: Number of results returned in this response.

Resources.description: Array of SCIM resource objects (Users or Groups).
